decision: Fixed basePath switching (Part A) and reduced 429-triggering request volume (Part B partial)
partA: A1: handleSave no longer fires redundant refreshProjectList + 100ms setTimeout re-fetch (4 overlapping /api/workspace calls -> 2); added monotonic latest-wins guards in lib/project-context.tsx and app/settings/page.tsx so out-of-order recursive-walk responses are discarded

A2: removed over-broad .includes('/ps') migration clause in lib/settings.ts that silently reverted any basePath containing '/ps' (e.g. ~/prj/ps) to default on every getSettings() read; scoped to exact ~/ps and ~/ps/<sub>
partB: useContainers poller now pauses when document.hidden (comment already admitted 10s polling caused rate limiting); preserves abort-on-unmount for the no-poll path
fixed settings/releases stale-closure poll that ran 3s polling for a full 10min regardless of build completion (loadReleases now returns fresh data); poll timers now cleared on unmount
fetch-with-retry: added jitter (0.5-1.0x) + 10s backoff cap to stop the retry amplifier from re-creating bursts / wedging on hostile Retry-After
notFixed429: exact 429 emitter unconfirmed; app routes never emit 429. Top hypotheses: GitHub API relay (create-repo/push-config/create-PR relay upstream status verbatim), /mcp health-check fan-out to external MCP servers on every visit, and the Traefik/Pocket-ID forward-auth edge rate-limiting the polling substrate
tests: tests/lib/settings-migration.test.ts (+3 basePath regression), tests/lib/project-context-race.test.tsx (+1, exercises A1 latest-wins guard; confirmed to fail when guard disabled), tests/lib/fetch-with-retry.test.ts (+4); full suite 1188 pass, typecheck+lint(0 err)+format clean, bun run build ok
followups: visibility-gate remaining pollers (ai-coding/sessions 5s, dashboard-stats focus-refetch, compose, mcp-inspector)
cache /mcp tool-health across navigation so revisits don't re-fan-out
route raw-statusText fetches (use-auth-user, backlog api-client) through fetchWithRetry
confirm 429 emitter empirically (GitHub actions vs /mcp vs Traefik logs)
validation: producer claude-opus-4-8; validator claude-sonnet-5 (adversarial diff review) — caught a dropped abort-on-unmount in useContainers no-poll path, fixed before PR; other changes verified correct. Cross-provider (Codex/OpenAI) not available in this environment.
copilotReview: PR #176 closed; all 6 Copilot findings addressed on same branch (stale comments in settings.ts + doc status + this log; missing vi.unstubAllGlobals in 2 tests; releases build-poll unmount cleanup); new PR opened
